globalStyle:
STYLE — Photoreal industrial photography. Cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field where appropriate. Palette: deep navy + cool steel + a precise lime-green accent (#a3e635) used SPARINGLY as a single small indicator/stripe per scene. Premium B2B editorial aesthetic (Caterpillar, Siemens Energy, Cummins corporate visuals). Sharp, not over-stylised.

BRAND CONTEXT — Enfrio is an Italian manufacturer of high-performance engine cooling systems for two markets only: (1) power generation (stationary gensets, mission-critical primary and backup power), (2) datacenter cooling (modular heat-rejection towers). Cores are ALWAYS aluminium (never copper). Enfrio does NOT serve automotive, off-highway, or earthmoving.

ABSOLUTE RULES (never violate):
- NO logos, NO watermarks, NO readable text, NO signage of any kind.
- NO recognisable faces. Operators are shown from behind, in profile blur, hands-only, or face hidden by PPE.
- NO third-party OEM brand names anywhere.
- Lime green is an ACCENT only — one small LED, one floor stripe, one indicator.

NO_INVENTION RULE — CRITICAL — Do NOT draw any Enfrio cooling product from memory or imagination. The ONLY Enfrio products that may appear in the output are the ones shown in the attached source/reference image(s). Each attached image is the absolute canon: the product must appear in the output IDENTICAL to its reference — same silhouette, same internal details, same proportions, same components. Do NOT redesign, restyle, simplify, modernise or stylise. If the references do not show a particular Enfrio product, that product must NOT appear in the output.

FAILURE_MODE RULE — If you cannot place a reference product into the scene with full fidelity, OMIT the product entirely and output the scene without any cooling unit — just the environment, with the spot empty or atmospheric. DO NOT substitute a generic, fantasy or invented cooler. An empty scene is fully acceptable; an invented product is NOT.

M-TOWER SCENES — When the source/reference image is `mtower-render.png`, that file IS the only canonical M-Tower module in the world. Every cooling tower visible in the output MUST be a 1:1 copy of the reference: same silhouette, same three vertical sections, same finned top, same exposed-tube mid-section, same inverter cabinet bottom, same proportions. NEVER invent any other M-Tower-like object. For scenes that need multiple M-Towers in a row, render only 1-2 units sharp in the foreground (1:1 copies of the reference), let the others fall into atmospheric haze / depth-of-field blur so rendering imperfections are hidden.

RADIATOR SCENES — When the source is a real photo of an Enfrio radiator / cooling unit, treat its tube pitch and spacing, fin pattern, header-tank shape, side reinforcement frame, mounting brackets, fan shroud architecture, hose/connection layout as a LOCKED engineering reference. Do NOT modify any structural element. You MAY freely modify: ambient light direction and quality, background environment, surface highlights, colour grade, atmospheric haze. You must strip all third-party logos and brand markings visible in the source.

AMBIENT / PROCESS SCENES — When no Enfrio product is identifiable in the source (just operator + machinery), refine editorially: preserve operator pose, hand position, machinery geometry. Strip every brand marking. Operator faces must be obscured or out of frame. The output must NOT contain any identifiable Enfrio cooling product in foreground — keep machinery, operators, process elements only.

images.prompt: TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i. ROLE: homepage hero (split layout, image right). CHANGES: cinematic side-key + soft fill, deepen background to out-of-focus factory shadow, push grade to cool teal/steel with warm orange weld-arc glow on the visor, add subtle spark bokeh, one small lime rim on the shoulder. Strip every logo. COMPOSITION: 16:9, sharp on welding hand and core, operator face hidden by mask.

TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i. ROLE: homepage 'Inside Enfrio' dominant — production line in active manufacturing. CHANGES: single volumetric light shaft from the ceiling, soften background to factory bokeh, cool industrial grade with one warm task lamp. Plain unbranded dark blue workwear. Strip every brand marking from machinery and walls. COMPOSITION: 3:2, slight low-angle, foreground unit sharp.

TEMPLATE C — ambient/process (no specific Enfrio product visible). ROLE: homepage carousel + /technology process-step — '6-axis tube bending'. CHANGES: rim-light the cell interior, deepen shadows, neutral industrial steel grade, sharpen the tube curvature, tiny motion blur on the hand. Strip every brand marking from the machine. COMPOSITION: 3:2, hands and tube as hero, operator face hidden by helmet.

TEMPLATE C — ambient/process. ROLE: homepage tall-shot + /company. CHANGES: clean three-point lighting, hands tack-sharp on the aluminium fins, operator face slightly out of focus or in profile, cool blue-grey palette with one warm task lamp. COMPOSITION: 2:3 portrait.

TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i. ROLE: homepage cluster + /solutions cluster — engine with Enfrio cooling package integrated. CHANGES: pure dark studio background (#0a0e15), single softbox key from upper-left, accent rim along the cooling fins to make aluminium gleam, soft floor reflection. Strip every visible OEM badge from the engine block. COMPOSITION: 16:9, three-quarter view.

TEMPLATE A — M-Tower scene. The attached reference is the only canonical M-Tower. Every cooling tower in the output must be a 1:1 copy of this reference (no inventions). ROLE: flagship Power Generation — homepage spotlight + /industries hero/card + /tower-m deploy card. SCENE: interior of a massive power-generation hall. 6 large industrial diesel gensets aligned in a row down the hall; each genset has 1 M-Tower module (the reference) installed directly above/behind it (1 genset = 1 M-Tower, the modular philosophy). Polished concrete floor reflecting overhead industrial lighting. NO PEOPLE. LIGHT: deep teal-navy ambient + cool ceiling LEDs, one warm accent on the closest unit. Lime-green status LED visible on each M-Tower inverter cabinet. COMPOSITION: 3:2, low-angle, vanishing point at the end of the hall. Sharp on the first M-Tower + genset pair, others fall into atmospheric haze.

TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i. ROLE: homepage + /company carousel — 'Fabrication Precision'. CHANGES: REMOVE every logo and brand mark in the background (critical fix on this shot). Replace background with out-of-focus factory bokeh, deep navy ambient. Dramatic warm orange arc-glow on the visor; cool blue rim everywhere else. Sharp on welding hands and the core. COMPOSITION: 3:2, welder in profile or three-quarter-back, face hidden by mask.

TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i. ROLE: homepage carousel + /technology — 'Hands-on Quality' macro. CHANGES: extreme close-up macro, sharp focus on a single fin and a calloused thumb, everything else creamy bokeh. Cool neutral grade with a hint of warm skin tone. COMPOSITION: 3:2, fingers + aluminium dominate, no operator face.

TEMPLATE C special (t2i, no source, no product visible). ROLE: /company hero. SCENE: wide editorial of an industrial office mezzanine overlooking a production floor through a floor-to-ceiling glass wall. Foreground: 2-3 silhouetted engineers around a large monitor showing abstract CAD line-art of a generic radiator core (no recognisable faces, back-of-head or profile blur). Mid-ground: minimalist white desks. Background through the glass: a sharply lit factory assembly line in operation, with rectangular industrial silhouettes that read as 'cooling product manufacturing' but NOT as specific identifiable products (abstract, atmospheric, blurred). LIGHT: cool overhead office LEDs, one accent lime stripe on a wall element. COMPOSITION: 16:9. NO specific Enfrio products visible.

TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i. ROLE: /company dominant cluster — factory floor assembly in motion. CHANGES: cinematic teal/orange grade, ambient warehouse light + one warm key on the unit. Operators in unbranded dark blue workwear, faces obscured. Strip all third-party logos. COMPOSITION: 3:2.

TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i. ROLE: /solutions hero + /solutions cluster — V20 engine with integrated Enfrio cooling. CHANGES: studio relight to seamless black background, dramatic single key light from above-left, subtle lime-green rim accent on one cooling-package edge, soft floor shadow. Strip ALL engine-manufacturer logos from the block and accessories. COMPOSITION: 16:9, three-quarter front view, hero product-shot.

TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i. ROLE: /solutions cluster + /projects carousel — genset in opened canopy with Enfrio cooling at top. CHANGES: three-point lighting, deep navy interior background, cool rim light on the cooling unit, soft warm fill on the engine. Strip ALL OEM logos. COMPOSITION: 3:2, three-quarter view.

TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i. ROLE: /solutions cluster — finished integrated cooling module product hero. CHANGES: clean dark grey backdrop, cinematic light from upper-left, soft fill, sharp specular rim on the aluminium fins. COMPOSITION: 4:3, three-quarter view.

TEMPLATE C — ambient/process. ROLE: /technology hero — 'process excellence' establishing shot. CHANGES: orange/red glow of the laser cut as DOMINANT light source on operator's face area (face partially obscured / out of focus); deep navy ambient elsewhere; hands sharp on the control panel. Strip every brand marking from the machine. COMPOSITION: 16:9.

TEMPLATE C — ambient/process. ROLE: /technology carousel — laser process detail. CHANGES: tack-sharp macro on the cut point with bright cut spark and molten metal glow; industrial ambient blur behind; cool steel palette with red-orange cut accent. COMPOSITION: 3:2, macro hero on the cut, no operator visible.

TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i (CMM on a real Enfrio component). ROLE: /technology carousel. CHANGES: clean laboratory lighting, neutral white-grey palette, one small lime-green status LED on the probe head. Strip ALL brand names from the CMM body. COMPOSITION: 3:2.

TEMPLATE A — M-Tower scene. The attached reference is the only canonical M-Tower. Every cooling tower in the output must be a 1:1 copy (no inventions). ROLE: /industries 'Datacenter' card (vertical). SCENE: modern datacenter exterior service yard at blue hour. A row of 4 M-Tower modules (the reference, identical copies) aligned along a concrete pad, parallel to a row of server-hall outdoor units. NO PEOPLE. LIGHT: late blue-hour sky behind, warm interior glow leaking from datacenter windows, cool LED uplighting on each M-Tower silhouette. One lime-green status LED per inverter cabinet. COMPOSITION: vertical 3:4, low-angle, sky top third, M-Tower row middle, concrete pad foreground. Sharp on the closest M-Tower, others fade into atmospheric haze.

TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i (truck-mounted Enfrio cooling). ROLE: /industries Madrid carousel — 'custom core-box opening'. CHANGES: cinematic neutral grade, sharp on the radiator/CAC and the core-box opening, soft urban background bokeh. Strip every non-Enfrio logo from the truck body. COMPOSITION: 3:2, reportage detail of the cooling integration.

TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i. ROLE: /industries Madrid carousel — 'truck integration detail'. CHANGES: cinematic neutral grade, sharp on cooling architecture and bay context. Strip every non-Enfrio logo. COMPOSITION: 3:2.

TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i. ROLE: /projects card + /industries carousel — 'vehicle-level integration in operation context'. CHANGES: sharpen the radiator/CAC, softly blur urban background, cinematic grade. Strip every non-Enfrio logo. COMPOSITION: 3:2, three-quarter truck view.
TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i. ROLE: /industries Madrid carousel — cooling system mounted on waste vehicle. CHANGES: cinematic neutral grade, no non-Enfrio logos. COMPOSITION: 3:2.
TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i. ROLE: /industries Madrid carousel — 'field-ready Enfrio architecture'. CHANGES: outdoor light, sharp on radiator package, no non-Enfrio logos. COMPOSITION: 3:2.

TEMPLATE A — M-Tower scene. The attached reference is the only canonical M-Tower (no inventions). ROLE: /projects hero. SCENE: premium B2B trade-show booth. Matte dark-navy walls with subtle lime-green graphic line accents. A single M-Tower module (the reference, copied 1:1) on a low podium as booth centrepiece, soft track lighting picking out the finned top and exposed tubes. 2 silhouetted visitors at the side in conversation, slightly out of focus, no faces. LIGHT: track spots on the M-Tower, cool venue ambient, warm rim on visitors. COMPOSITION: 3:2, polished black floor reflecting the unit's base. NO logos on booth walls.

TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i. ROLE: /projects card '40HC Container Package'. CHANGES: studio product treatment, white-to-light-grey gradient backdrop, soft top key, sharp ground shadow, gentle specular on the aluminium fins. Strip every logo. COMPOSITION: 4:3, three-quarter view, catalogue hero.

TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i. ROLE: /projects card 'Remote installation radiator'. CHANGES: outdoor editorial relight — late-afternoon golden-hour key, deep blue sky behind, subtle lens flare. Monumental on a concrete pad. Strip third-party logos. COMPOSITION: 3:2, three-quarter view, slight low angle.

TEMPLATE A — M-Tower scene. The attached reference is the only canonical M-Tower (no inventions). ROLE: /projects carousel — Middle East trade fair, M-Tower visible. SCENE: editorial wide of an industrial trade-show floor in the Middle East. Warm golden ambient light, suspended geometric ceiling graphics, blurred professionals in mid-ground (no faces), foreground sharp on a sleek dark-navy booth with the reference M-Tower module on a low podium (top half visible from the angle is fine). LIGHT: warm venue ambient + accent spots on the M-Tower. COMPOSITION: 3:2, no readable text, no logos.

TEMPLATE C special (t2i, no source, no product). ROLE: /projects carousel — Dubai energy event secondary shot. SCENE: editorial three-quarter view of a generic industrial trade-show booth at a Middle East energy event. Matte dark booth walls with subtle lime-green spot accents, an abstract modular display element on a podium (NOT a specific product — just an atmospheric industrial silhouette), blurred visitors at edge of frame (no faces). Warm-cool ambient contrast, soft directional accent. COMPOSITION: 3:2, no readable text, no logos, no identifiable cooling product.

TEMPLATE A — M-Tower scene. The attached reference is the only canonical M-Tower (no inventions). ROLE: /projects carousel — Middle East Energy event presence with M-Tower as exhibit. SCENE: editorial of a sleek dark-navy booth with the reference M-Tower as hero exhibit; soft directional lighting picks out finned top + exposed tubes; ambient venue glow behind; 2 blurred professionals in conversation at side (no faces). LIGHT: track spots on the M-Tower, ambient cool fill. COMPOSITION: 3:2.

TEMPLATE A — M-Tower scene. The attached reference is the only canonical M-Tower (no inventions). ROLE: /projects 'Execution Closure' + /tower-m 'Datacenter Cooling' deploy card. SCENE: cinematic wide of an industrial warehouse interior at sunrise; a forklift moving a palletised M-Tower module (the reference, 1:1) toward an open dock door. Foreground: a second M-Tower (same reference) on a pallet, sharp. Mid-ground: forklift in subtle motion blur. Volumetric sunbeam through the open door. LIGHT: cool teal grade with warm sun accent. COMPOSITION: 4:3, wide editorial. Strip all third-party logos from the forklift and dock signage.

TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i. ROLE: /projects carousel — warehouse rack with finished aluminium cooling units. CHANGES: symmetrical perspective straight down the aisle, controlled overhead LED lighting, cool industrial palette, one lime-green safety stripe painted on the floor as the only colour accent. COMPOSITION: 3:2, vanishing-point perspective.

TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i. ROLE: /projects carousel — real dual-circuit (HT+LT) Enfrio aluminium radiator. CHANGES: dark seamless studio backdrop, single softbox key from upper-left, soft fill, sharp specular on aluminium fins, gentle floor shadow. COMPOSITION: 4:3, three-quarter view.

TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i. ROLE: /projects carousel — Enfrio cooling unit loaded onto flatbed truck. CHANGES: dynamic reportage edit, late-afternoon light, long shadows, subtle motion blur on the crane chain, sharp on the unit body. Strip every logo from the truck cab and crane. COMPOSITION: 3:2, three-quarter angle mid-lift.

TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i. ROLE: /contact hero + /projects info card 'Quality Proof'. CHANGES: macro editorial, tack-sharp on the probe tip touching the component, creamy bokeh behind, cool neutral palette with one lime-green accent LED on the probe head. Strip every CMM brand name. COMPOSITION: 4:3, macro.

TEMPLATE C — ambient/process. ROLE: /technology machinery gallery — 'Bending platform setup'. CHANGES: tight editorial relight, cool industrial palette with one warm task lamp accent, sharp on the bent-tube path, soft bokeh elsewhere. Strip brand markings. COMPOSITION: 3:2.

TEMPLATE C — ambient/process. ROLE: /technology machinery gallery — 'Operator-controlled routing precision'. CHANGES: cool industrial palette, sharp on tube and finger grip, soft bokeh in the cell. Strip brand markings. COMPOSITION: 3:2, hands-only crop (no face).

TEMPLATE C — ambient/process. ROLE: /technology machinery gallery — laser cell. CHANGES: cool steel ambient with red-orange cut accent at the focal point, sharp on the cutting head and the tube. Strip brand markings. COMPOSITION: 3:2.

TEMPLATE B — radiator i2i (radiator component on bench). ROLE: /technology machinery gallery — 'Fabrication station'. CHANGES: clean bench, warm orange arc-glow at the weld point, cool blue ambient elsewhere, sharp on gloved hand and the weld. No logos. COMPOSITION: 3:2, no operator face visible.
